title: A Tree-based RAG-Agent Recommendation System: A Case Study in Medical Test Data

defines.name: HiRMed
defines.definition: A hierarchical RAG-enhanced tree-structured system for medical test recommendation that performs medical reasoning at each node to guide diagnostic test selection.

problem: Traditional similarity-based and rule-based medical test recommendation methods fail to capture hierarchical medical reasoning, integrate domain knowledge across diagnostic stages, and balance coverage with specificity.
